mapper.sql: su.id, su.username, su.password, su.real_name, su.email, su.phone, su.status, su.role_id, su.create_time, su.update_time, sr.role_name, sr.role_code, su.login_failed_count, su.account_locked, su.locked_time, su.last_login_time, su.last_login_ip
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user su LEFT JOIN sys_role sr ON su.role_id = sr.id WHERE su.username = #{username} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM sys_user su LEFT JOIN sys_role sr ON su.role_id = sr.id WHERE su.username = #{username} AND su.status = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM sys_user su LEFT JOIN sys_role sr ON su.role_id = sr.id WHERE su.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM sys_user su LEFT JOIN sys_role sr ON su.role_id = sr.id WHERE su.real_name = #{realName} LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user su
su.status != 0
AND su.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{realName}, '%')
AND su.role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, real_name, email, phone, status, role_id, create_time, update_time, login_failed_count, account_locked) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{status}, #{roleId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, 0, 0)
